name: Great Migrations: A People on the Move
original_name: Great Migrations: A People on the Move
overview: Explores the transformative impact of Black migration on American culture and society. From the waves of Black Americans to the North—and back South—over the last century to the growing number of immigrants from Africa and the Caribbean today, movement is a defining feature of the Black experience.

trailers.title: Great Migrations: A People on the Move | Official Trailer | Premieres January 28, 2025 on OETA
